title: aspidium simplex
intro: Aspidium simplex, also known as the Simple Shield Fern, is a species of fern that belongs to the family Dryopteridaceae. It is used in traditional medicine, valued for its medicinal properties, which include anti-inflammatory and antioxidant properties. The health benefits of Aspidium simplex include its ability to alleviate headaches, reduce fever, and improve digestion, making it a popular herbal remedy in many parts of the world. Aspidium simplex can be prepared into herbal teas, infusions, or dried extracts, which are often used to harness its medicinal properties and health benefits.
